semantic.role: Automated release gate script for project quality validation
responsibilities: Define and execute sequential quality gates (build, unit tests, schema tests, protocol validation, pack check)
Log start and pass of each gate for observability
Block release if any gate fails

English.purpose: This script orchestrates a predefined series of release gates to ensure the project meets quality standards before a release is made.
English.context_and_audience: Developers and CI/CD pipelines use this script to automatically validate that the codebase builds, passes unit and schema tests, protocol validation, and pack consistency checks. It is a pre‑release safety net.
key_takeaways: The script runs five gates in strict order: build, unit-tests, schema-tests, protocol-validate, pack-check.
Each gate outputs a start and pass message for traceability.
If any gate fails, the script stops immediately and the release process is halted.
The script is written in Node.js and uses execSync for synchronous execution.
